allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tsx version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('bin:', d.get\('bin'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} versions'\); [print\(f\\"  {v['operator_version']}: k8s={v['kubernetes_supported']} os={v['openshift_supported']}\\"\) for v in d[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} versions'\); [print\(f\\"  {v['operator_version']}: k8s={v['kubernetes_supported']} os={v['openshift_supported']}\\"\) for v in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('versions:', len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=type\(d\); print\(f'type={t.__name__} len={len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else \\"n/a\\"}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} bugs for CSI 2.12.0'\); [print\(f\\"  [{b['severity']}] {b['title'][:60]}\\"\) for b in d[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['rows']; [print\(f\\"{r['operator_version']}: os={r['openshift']}\\"\) for r in d[:8]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; releases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'=== {r[\\"tag_name\\"]} ===\\n{r[\\"body\\"][:2000]}\\n'\) for r in releases]")
